comment: Small Hours rules metadata (plan §5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/smallhours.ts. Design truth: design/tables/smallhours/BRIEF.md.

sweepCombo.comment: The City Sweep (full orbit): repeat sweeps inside the window escalate ×2 per step.

dial.comment: The Dial: spinner spins tune the transmitter; TUNED arms one Signal Boost on the Aerial Run (and the deck starts its slow drift). While TUNED the studio monitors are up: sling kicks run at slingBoost.

aerial.comment: A completed Aerial Run ride (mouth to mast). Tuned rides pay the boost instead.

phone.comment: The Phone scoop: each capture awards the next request (wrapping); the MYSTERY B-SIDE advances the Clock an hour and lights REQUEST SHOW; every capture lights the Side Door.

clock.comment: Completing W-A-V-E advances one hour; the bonus multiplier tracks the hour (capped) and each completion lights the GENERATOR kickback. Letters lane-change on the flippers and persist across balls.

requestShow.comment: DMD video mode (M12 pattern): lit by the MYSTERY B-SIDE; the scoop holds the ball while the flippers cue SIDE A / SIDE B ahead of the needle. All five cues right puts a caller on the line.

onAir.comment: Fader bank completion lights CALLER; a lit switchboard capture puts a caller on hold (physical lock). callersRequired on the line starts ON AIR — durationS of ×scoreFactor with jackpots on the Aerial Run and the City Sweep; the other shot within segueS of a jackpot pays the PERFECT SEGUE bonus. Lit switchboard arrivals mid-mode pay CALLER JACKPOT.

dawnChorus.comment: Wizard mode: reach 5 AM, start one ON AIR and make one Signal Boost; the Phone then lights for THE DAWN CHORUS.

deadAir.comment: Score nothing for warnS and the DMD dissolves to static; every drainS after that a slice of the listeners tunes out (bonus units shrink). Armed by the first score of each ball.

skill.comment: NIGHT OWLS (differentiation pass): a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-nightowls band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and a bundle of listeners. Once per ball.
